name: jetpack-theme/pricing-hero
title: Pricing Hero
description: Hero section with a WebGL aurora effect. Reusable on any landing page — set title, subtitle, and CTAs via block attributes.

title.default: Everything Pro adds to the free Jetpack plugin.

subtitle.default: Real-time backups. Malware scanning. Boost performance. Jetpack Social. One plugin, one price, one place to manage it all.

attributes.title: Everything Pro adds to the free Jetpack plugin.
attributes.subtitle: One plugin, one price, one place to manage security, performance, and growth.
